description: Allowlist of senders authorized to drive the marketing brain via emails to marketing@ryan-realty.com. Read by lib/marketing-brain/inbox-allowlist.ts at runtime. Anyone with the inbox address can email it; only senders matching one of allowlisted_emails or allowlisted_domains get parsed and dispatched. Everyone else is logged with status='killed' and (per default_action_on_unknown_sender) optionally gets a polite bounce.

default_action_options.reject_silent: Drop the email, log with status='killed'. No reply.
default_action_options.reject_and_alert: Drop the email, log with status='killed', send a polite bounce reply to the sender.

notes: matt@ryan-realty.com is the primary trigger address.
mattmryan2@gmail.com is Matt's personal Gmail — used as a from-anywhere trigger when his work mailbox isn't loaded.
ryan-realty.com domain wildcard covers all current and future broker mailboxes (matt@, paul@, rebecca@, etc.).
Updates to this file land in the same commit as code that uses them. The producer-registry pattern.
